notes: VERDICT BASIS: independently re-enumerated all 9,370 unique series across 12 categories from GET /series (9,797 rows pre-dedupe) and diffed against the 110-series inventory. The crawl missed ~22 WC-related series carrying roughly 500 markets total (~284 in Sports KXWC* series its own prefix filter should have caught, ~216 in cross-category novelty series). Highest-volume misses: KXWCGROUPBOTTOM (~872K contracts), KXWCMESSIMBAPPE (~795K), KXWCADS (~582K), KXTRUMPWORLDCUP (~482K), KXWCPRICE (~459K), KXWCMESSIRONALDO (~450K). Seven missed series are named in research/fact-base.json itself. SPOT-CHECK CAVEATS: KXWCHOSTWIN-26 is an event ticker; its market KXWCHOSTWIN-26-Y is in the inventory (counted found). KXWCFINALMATCHUP is in the inventory's series table but with 0 events/0 markets, and the live API confirms the series genuinely has no events - Kalshi lists final-matchup markets under KXWCMATCHUP-26FIN instead (present in inventory, 3 events / 360 markets) - so this spot-check failure is Kalshi's catalog structure, not a crawl gap. INTERNALS ALL CLEAN for what was crawled: 0 duplicate tickers, 0 null open_time/close_time, exactly 48 winner legs in KXMENWORLDCUP-26, 102 KXWCGAME events = 100 played (72 group + 16 R32 + 8 R16 + 4 QF) + 2 scheduled semis (KXWCGAME-26JUL14FRAESP and -26JUL15ENGARG both present; 3rd-place and final events cannot exist yet because team codes are undetermined), status mix 30,033 finalized / 1,056 active / 96 closed / 2 inactive is consistent with a semifinal-stage tournament (active concentrated in KXWCAWARD 289, KXWCSTART 104, KXWCTEAMLEADGOAL 96, semis match markets). Per-series market counts match the API exactly for all 6 series cross-checked (KXMENWORLDCUP 48, KXWCGOALLEADER 54, KXWCGAME 306, KXWCSCORE 2612, KXWCADVANCE 60, KXWCTOTALGOAL 103), so within-series coverage looks complete - the gaps are entirely missing series. FACT-BASE ~80 CLAIM: stale undercount. Live API shows 111 KXWC*-prefixed Sports-category series today (109 after excluding KXWCCODWARZONE esports and KXWCCREG basketball); the inventory covers only 99 of them. KXWC2HSCORE does not exist (404) even though KXWC1HSCORE does - real asymmetry on Kalshi, not a crawl miss.
